steps.title: Use each as singular
steps.content: The subject is "Each of these republics." Even though "republics" is plural, the word "each" makes the subject singular. The surrounding passage also describes a past Soviet-era situation.

steps.title: Match number and tense
steps.content: Choice A is plural and present perfect. Choice B is present tense. Choice C is past tense but plural. The remaining verb is singular and past tense, fitting both the subject and the historical context. The answer is D.
